name: transaction-type-broker-initial-intent-purchase
rationale: Broker intake explicitly identifies the deal as a purchase. loan_application doc shows 'Purchase'. No correction. F1.TT canonical-map resolves via broker_initial_intent tier; TT=P drives downstream purchase-specific behavior (LTV math, doc requirements). Tests F1.TT in purchase variant — distinct from refi-baseline scenarios.
notes: Single-event sequence. Same shape as A02 but for TT field with TT=P.
